ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot interacting with a printer, mimicking the action of someone placing a document on the printer or retrieving a printout.  The animation will focus on the robot's left arm, with the right arm remaining mostly still for balance. Frame 1 shows the left arm in a neutral position. In frame 2, the left arm moves forward as if positioning a document.  Frame 3 shows the left arm extending further, as if placing the document on the printer.  Frame 4 shows the left arm retracting slightly, and frame 5 shows the left arm returning to its neutral position. The right arm will stay relatively still throughout the sequence.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to print
left arm moves forward, paper in hand
left arm extends, placing the document down
left arm pulls back slightly, job initiated
left arm returns to rest, printing begins
